test.name: Example Test

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Opening browser 'firefox' to base url ' at '.

InvalidArgumentException: Message: Expected "url" to be a valid URL, got at Stacktrace: RemoteError@chrome://remote/content/shared/RemoteError.sys.mjs:8:8 WebDriverError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:202:5 InvalidArgumentError@chrome://remote/content/shared/webdriver/Errors.sys.mjs:404:5 GeckoDriver.prototype.navigateTo@chrome://remote/content/marionette/driver.sys.mjs:1196:11
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
